name: @deckup/theme-apple-basic
description: An Apple-inspired presentation theme with bold black typography, generous whitespace, and a crisp monochrome palette.

cover.description: Opens with a large left-aligned black title and bold subtitle on a white canvas.

number.description: Centers an exceptionally large bold metric with a prominent supporting caption.

page.description: Builds a spacious content page with a large bold title, subtitle, and lightweight body text.

quote.description: Centers a large lightweight quotation with a compact bold attribution.

section.description: Introduces a section with an oversized lightweight heading aligned to the left.

statement.description: Centers an oversized lightweight statement for maximum visual emphasis.

two-column.description: Places a large title and subtitle above two airy columns of lightweight text.
